mainMenu.summaryLoading: Loading your current device status and live power data.
mainMenu.summaryUnavailable: Live dashboard data is currently unavailable. Check the local API connection and token configuration.
mainMenu.summaryStatsUnavailable: Device inventory shows {onlineCount} of {totalCount} devices online. Live power stats are currently unavailable.
mainMenu.summaryDevicesUnavailable: {consumptionKw} kW is currently managed across your power limits, with {productionKw} kW of production available right now.
mainMenu.summaryProductionAhead: {onlineCount} of {totalCount} devices are online. Solar production is ahead by {netKw} kW against {consumptionKw} kW of current consumption.
mainMenu.summaryConsumptionAhead: {onlineCount} of {totalCount} devices are online. Current consumption is {consumptionKw} kW, which is {netKw} kW above solar production.
